text: Bojh feeling low hai. Kal se better handle karungi.

text: Final kal anchor: 5-minute breath reset, aur meeting se pehle 3 contribution points read. Bas ye do.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se continuity of regulation mirror karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sunnpan gaya lag raha. Ab main better feel kar rahi.

speaker: Supporter

coping_shade_signal: main bas sunn hokar baithi hoon
text: Main bas sunn hokar baithi hoon, na bhook lag rahi na pyaas. Andar sirf dukh aur nakami ka loop chal raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens F se numb-overwhelm quality mirror karke safe space dena.
text: Abhi tum ek aise flood mein ho jahan feeling bhi heavy hai aur body bhi shut-down mode mein hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main loop mein fasi hoon. Laptop kholne ki soch se bhi aur panic aa jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se prolonged freeze state ki continuity mirror karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Boss ne team ke samne capability pe sawal uthaya tha. Tab se humiliation flood ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghar pe sabko lagta hai main dual burden smoothly sambhal rahi. Andar sirf nakami mehsus ho rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se collapse-of-image fear mirror karna.
text: Andar ka darr yeh bhi hai ki agar yeh image toot gayi toh ghar aur kaam dono jagah tumhe judge kiya jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur mujhe lagta hai log bolenge bas dikhawa karti thi. Yeh sochke main phir sunn ho jati.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shame state ke neeche helplessness aur loss of self-worth reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tumhe sirf insult ka dard nahi, balki apni nazar mein bhi gir jaane ka ehsaas pakad ke baitha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, exactly. Sunnpan kam hua hai thoda, batao ab kya karoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par 3 short duty-fit options dena.
text: Abhi ke liye 3 tiny steps: (1) 4 minute breathing + paani ke 3 sips, (2) ghar ke liye aaj sirf ek simple meal decide, (3) notes mein 2 lines likho - aaj ka ek kaam jo tumne poora kiya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Breathing ki aur ek meal plan decide kiya. Flooding slow feel ho rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: One micro-task ko exact steps mein kara ke freeze todna.
text: Pehle notes app kholo. Phir likho: "Aaj despite heavy meeting, maine dinner plan kiya." Uske neeche likho: "Kal ka first 10-minute task kya hoga." Bas itna hi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Likha maine. Dukh halka lag raha.
